description: Configure an OpenICE monitoring station for a Modified Early Warning Score (MEWS) pilot. Create three simulated device adapters: a 'Multiparameter Monitor', a 'Pulse Oximeter', and a temperature-capable device. Confirm data flow using the 'Vital Signs' clinical application and save a screenshot of the active setup to /home/ga/Desktop/mews_monitoring_screenshot.png. Produce a feasibility assessment at /home/ga/Desktop/mews_feasibility_assessment.txt that includes a list of the created devices, a reference table of MEWS scoring ranges, an 'Automation Gap Analysis' section identifying which MEWS parameters cannot be automated by sensors, and a final recommendation.
